description: Legal document in Hebrew. Dating: Probably 11th century if not earlier. Might be a join with ENA 3656.1, but it is too hard to tell. Mentions: Fustat, ʿEli b. [...], [...] bt. Rāsī(??) b. Yiṣḥaq, Sūq al-Ṣarf, the 24 portions of a house, "to my husband Suqayr."
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
